method: source audit plus test discovery, focused route/action Jest commands recorded in APS-E018, APS-E019, and APS-E025, focused Chromium browser gate recorded in APS-E020, local/mocked provider-adjacent Jest command recorded in APS-E021 through APS-E024, and partial live HTTP transport probes recorded in APS-E025

claims.claim: Authentication/session/login/signup behavior is documented from source evidence.
claims.citation: APS-E001, APS-E002, APS-E003, APS-E004, APS-E005, APS-E006

claims.claim: Verification and password recovery behavior is documented from source evidence.
Profile, settings, saved listings, favorites, saved searches, and data-model claims are documented from source evidence.
claims.citation: APS-E010, APS-E011, APS-E012, APS-E013, APS-E014, APS-E015, APS-E016

claims.claim: Browser/runtime behavior and focused tests have been verified.
claims.citation: runtime-verification.md; APS-E018, APS-E019, APS-E020, APS-E021, APS-E022, APS-E023, APS-E024, APS-E025, APS-G001, APS-G002, APS-G003, APS-G005
claims.discrepancy: Focused route/action Jest coverage passed in APS-E018, APS-E019, and APS-E025; the focused Chromium browser gate passed in APS-E020; local/mocked provider-adjacent checks passed in APS-E021 through APS-E024; and APS-E025 live HTTP probes verified status/CSRF/JSON behavior for the listed auth/favorites routes. Real Google IdP OAuth, Cloudflare Turnstile siteverify, Resend delivery/inbox receipt, and Stripe hosted checkout/webhook/provider fulfillment remain unverified. Live cache-header parity remains residual because APS-E025 observed `Cache-Control: private, no-cache`, not the route-handler/direct-test `private, no-store` expectation.
claims.recommendedFix: Run real-provider checks for Google, Cloudflare Turnstile, Resend, and Stripe in a non-production-safe environment with test credentials. Resolve or explicitly accept the APS-E025 live cache-header mismatch between `private, no-cache` and the route-handler/direct-test `private, no-store` expectation.

claims.claim: Account deletion retention expectations are verified against product/legal requirements.
claims.discrepancy: Source tombstone behavior is documented, but product/legal retention requirements were not verified.
claims.recommendedFix: Review account deletion behavior with product/legal policy owners and update 12-gaps-unknowns-and-questions.md.

coverageGaps.gap: Focused route/action status, CSRF, and auth/favorites private no-store checks passed in APS-E019. APS-E025 live HTTP probes verified status/CSRF/JSON behavior for the listed auth/favorites routes and unauthenticated favorites GET behavior, but live cache-header parity remains residual because observed live responses returned `Cache-Control: private, no-cache`.

Local/mocked provider-adjacent paths passed in APS-E021 through APS-E024, but real Google IdP OAuth, Cloudflare Turnstile siteverify, Resend delivery/inbox receipt, and Stripe hosted checkout/webhook/provider fulfillment were not runtime verified.
Policy/legal expectations for retained records were not verified beyond source behavior.
Saved-search alert paywall and checkout routes/components have local mocked coverage, but real Stripe hosted checkout, webhook, and provider fulfillment are not payment-runtime verified.
